requests.name: 根据key和values查询introduce列表/v1/user/introduce/findByKey/83WEp0BZ/entityNo
requests.description:
entityNo为key，是变量（entityNo,name,id)
83WEp0BZ为values,是变量列表，逗号分隔urlEncode
